title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 644.504 - Commissioners authorized to borrow additional $35,000,000 for control of water pollution
text:
644.504.  Commissioners authorized to borrow additional $35,000,000 for control of water pollution. — In addition to those sums authorized prior to September 28, 1987, the board of fund commissioners of the state of Missouri, as authorized by Section 37(c) of Article III of the Constitution of the State of Missouri, is authorized to borrow, on the credit of this state, the sum of thirty-five million dollars in the manner and for the purposes set out in this chapter.
(L. 1987 S.B. 210 § 204.504)
